title: System Settings
description: Explore System Settings and customize your Mac.

steps.instruction: Open System Settings from the Dock (⚙️ gear icon).
steps.hint: Click the gear icon (⚙️) in the Dock at the bottom.

steps.instruction: In System Settings, click on 'Wallpaper' in the sidebar.
steps.hint: Look at the left sidebar and click 'Wallpaper'.

steps.instruction: Click on the 'Monterey' wallpaper to change your desktop background.
steps.hint: Click on the blue wallpaper option labeled 'Monterey'.

steps.instruction: Now click 'About This Mac' in the sidebar to see system information.
steps.hint: Click 'About This Mac' in the settings sidebar.

steps.instruction: Try changing the wallpaper to another option — pick any you like!
steps.hint: Go back to Wallpaper in the sidebar and click a different wallpaper option.

steps.instruction: Close System Settings by clicking the red traffic light button.
steps.hint: Click the red circle in the top-left of the System Settings window.
